title: Bordeaux, Nouvelle-Aquitaine — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bordeaux, Nouvelle-Aquitaine: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bordeaux is a city in Nouvelle-Aquitaine with a population of 260,000. The world capital of wine, with elegant 18th-century architecture, a vibrant riverfront, and renowned vineyards.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
